text.title: Burndown Diagnosis Cheatsheet Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Burndown Diagnosis Cheatsheet.

example.scenario: 10-day sprint, day 5: actual is 35% above ideal. Diagnostic finds scope-creep (2 stories added on day 3/4) and blocker-stack (1 design blocker stale 4 days). Remediation: move added stories to next sprint, escalate design blocker. Burndown recovers by day 8.
